247iBET UI/UX Audit — Formal Delivery Package

This package captures the read-only audit, the targeted polish summary, validation evidence, and the artifact chain used to support the final delivery.

Generated2026-05-07T06:32:26Z
Workspace commit627ea43
StatusValidated
ScopeUX polish, accessibility, quality gates, evidence chain

Executive summary

The audit confirms that the recent polish pass improved clarity, hierarchy, responsiveness, and trust presentation while preserving existing behavior.

  • reduced visual noise in the age gate and primary navigation
  • improved spacing, type hierarchy, and CTA clarity
  • strengthened mobile ergonomics and footer behavior
  • aligned brand copy toward first-party operator voice
  • removed lint warnings and validated code quality gates

Changes summarized

  • src/styles/base.css — removed redundant body declarations and normalized heading weight
  • src/lib/components/SEOFooter.svelte — tightened mobile safe-area spacing
  • src/routes/age-gate/+page.svelte — improved spacing and readability
  • src/lib/components/ReadyToPlay.svelte — removed aggressive uppercase/shimmer styling
  • src/lib/components/FAQ.svelte — improved contrast and framing
  • src/lib/components/Navbar.svelte — removed duplicate bonus navigation item
  • src/styles/design-system.css — improved focus/target clarity for view-all links
  • src/routes/+page.svelte — refined FAQ tone and image sizing
  • tests/ibet-brand.test.ts — aligned expectations to current first-party brand voice
  • lint cleanup across route files — removed stale LAST_UPDATED declarations

Validation status

  • logs/verification.log — pnpm check, lint, test, build passed
  • logs/accessibility-robust.log — Playwright a11y e2e passed
  • Recorded browser audit: Lighthouse desktop 99 / 100 / 96 / 92
  • Recorded browser audit: WCAG robust scan 7/7 pages passed, no Axe violations

Homepage / age-gate view evidence

Conclusion

The package documents a small-scope, high-impact UX polish pass with validated quality gates and a clear evidence chain.
